commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=29064bbfb6339b65d582c06bd2ff47716b4e0b38)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves per-agent auth profile and auth routing state from JSON files into each agent SQLite databases, with doctor migration, docs, backup, secrets, and tests adjusted around that storage change.

PR surface: Source +661, Tests -2756, Docs 0, Generated +26. Total -2069 across 74 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: call `saveAuthProfileStore(customAgentDir)` before the directory is registered, then later open the same DB as the configured agent id; the proposed code writes an inferred owner and current owner validation rejects the configured id. I did not run a mutating repro because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers include contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer review of a broad protected-label auth migration, so this should stay in human review rather than ClawSweeper repair automation.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
